messages.content: Hi! I always have such a hard time keeping streaks on the library app or Duolingo but Duolingo just implemented this feature where you can lock certain apps until youâve done a lesson or added to your streak for the day. This is made it SO easy for me to stay consistent as Iâve chosen TikTok and instagram to be blocked each day. All I do is complete one lesson and then my apps unlock. I know this might be hard to implement with the screen time settings and everything but please keep it in mind as I think it would be a great feature! Iâll also mention that itâs optional and you have to opt in to locking your apps which I think is important. You should go check it out on Duolingo. Also I love tether!! Thanks so much!!
